item.title: 4499 元起，苹果发布 iPhone 17e 和 M4 iPad Air
item.guid: 4499-元起，苹果发布-iPhone-17e-和-M4-iPad-Air
item.description:
Last night, Apple officially launched the iPhone 17e and the new iPad Air with the M4 chip on its official website. 昨晚，苹果正式在官网上架 iPhone 17e 与搭载 M4 芯片的新款 iPad Air。

The starting price of the iPhone 17e is 4499 yuan, with a base storage of 256GB: iPhone 17e 的起售价为 4499 元，起步容量来到 256G：

    Features a 6.1-inch 60Hz notch display;

    Adds MagSafe magnetic support;

    Equipped with an A19 chip, offering up to 4-core GPU;

    Features a 48MP single camera and a new generation portrait mode, allowing focus and depth of field adjustment after shooting;

    Equipped with Apple's self-developed N1 wireless network chip and C1X baseband, supporting single SIM+eSIM or dual eSIM.

The new iPad Air is equipped with the M4 chip, starting at 4799 yuan: 新款 iPad Air 搭载 M4 芯片，起售价 4799 元：

    Available in 11-inch and 13-inch sizes;

    Equipped with 12GB unified memory;

    Equipped with Apple's self-developed N1 wireless network chip, with the cellular version additionally featuring the C1X baseband;

    Available in four colors: Space Gray, Blue, Purple, and Starlight.

Both new products will open for pre-order tomorrow evening at 10:15 PM and officially go on sale on March 11th. 两款新品均将在明晚 10:15 开启预购，并于 3 月 11 日正式发售。

🔗 Related reading: 3999 yuan after national subsidy? iPhone 17e released, surprisingly with MagSafe + eSIM 🔗 相关阅读： 国补后 3999 元？iPhone 17e 发布，居然还有磁吸 + eSIM

item.title: 小米机器人进汽车工厂「实习」
item.guid: 小米机器人进汽车工厂「实习」
item.description:
According to official Xiaomi news, yesterday, the Xiaomi humanoid robot completed a 3-hour autonomous operation test at the Beijing automobile factory, achieving a success rate of 90.2% and meeting the production line's fastest cycle time requirement of 76 seconds. 据小米官方消息，昨天，小米人形机器人在北京汽车工厂完成了为期 3 小时的自主作业测试，成功率达到 90.2%，并满足最快 76 秒的产线生产节拍要求。

During the test, the robot was required to perform precise gripping and installation at the self-tapping nut loading station. The Xiaomi team utilized an end-to-end data-driven control method, combining the Vision-Language-Action large model Xiaomi-Robotics-0 with a reinforcement learning framework, enabling the robot to maintain stability and efficiency under complex working conditions. Key technical highlights include: 在测试中，机器人需在自攻螺母上件工站完成精准抓取与安装。小米团队通过端到端数据驱动的控制方法，结合 Vision-Language-Action 大模型 Xiaomi-Robotics-0 与强化学习框架，使机器人能够在复杂工况下保持稳定与高效。技术亮点包括：

    Multimodal Perception : Integrates visual, tactile, and joint proprioceptive information to reduce the probability of state misjudgment;

    Whole-Body Motion Control : Employs a hybrid architecture of optimized control and reinforcement learning, achieving millisecond-level solutions and zero-shot transfer, ensuring balance under extreme disturbances;

    Tactile Information Fusion : Introduces tactile feedback in dense contact scenarios to enhance stability and robustness.

During the pilot process, the robot successfully completed self-tapping nut installation, but typical failure cases still existed due to insufficient alignment precision, leading to jamming or loose fitting. Xiaomi stated that to achieve broader industrial deployment, core bottlenecks such as production cycle time and qualification rate still need to be addressed. 在试点过程中，机器人成功完成了自攻螺母安装，但仍存在因对位精度不足导致卡滞或贴合不紧密的典型失效案例。小米表示，要实现更大范围的产业化部署，仍需解决生产节拍与合格率的核心瓶颈。

Currently, Xiaomi has conducted verification at workstations such as material box handling and front emblem installation. In the future, it will continue to advance the application of robots in automobile manufacturing and make relevant technical resources and experimental videos available for industry reference. 目前，小米已在料箱搬运、前徽标安装等工站开展验证，未来将继续推进机器人在汽车制造中的应用，并开放相关技术资源与实验视频供业界参考。

According to media reports, Xiaomi Group President Lu Weibing stated at MWC 2026 that he believes there is a high probability that robots will be able to enter Xiaomi's production lines on a large scale within the next five years. 另据媒体报道，小米集团总裁卢伟冰在 MWC 2026 现场表示，相信在未来的五年之内，机器人能够大规模地进入小米产线工作，具有很大的可能性。

item.title: 曝原星纪魅族副总裁曾洋入职小米
item.guid: 曝原星纪魅族副总裁曾洋入职小米
item.description:
According to Bian News, Zeng Yang, former Vice President of Xingji Meizu, recently joined Xiaomi Group's public relations department as Media Director. 据鞭牛士报道，原星纪魅族副总裁曾洋已于近日加盟小米集团公关部，出任媒介总监。

Zeng Yang was previously responsible for marketing, branding, and public relations at Xingji Meizu. Earlier, he served as a reporter, editor-in-chief, and producer at CCTV Finance Channel, and also held important positions at companies like Zhihu and JD.com, including Deputy Party Secretary, Executive Editor-in-Chief, Research Institute Dean, and various public relations management roles. 曾洋此前在星纪魅族负责市场品牌与公关传播事务，更早之前曾在中央电视台财经频道担任记者、主编、制片人等职务，也在知乎、京东等公司承担要职，包括党委副书记、执行总编辑、研究院院长及公关相关管理岗位。

His professional experience spans media, content platforms, and consumer technology companies, and he is regarded as an executive with comprehensive communication and brand management capabilities. 其职业经历横跨媒体、内容平台与消费科技企业，被视为具备复合型传播与品牌管理能力的高管。

According to Jiemian News, Wan Zhiqiang, CMO of Xingji Meizu Group China, disclosed several business developments during a recent live broadcast on Meizu's JD.com self-operated store, confirming that Meizu 23 has completed development but will not be released to the public. 另据界面新闻报道，星纪魅族集团中国区 CMO 万志强在日前魅族京东自营店的直播中披露了多项业务进展，确认魅族 23 已完成开发，但不会对外发售。

He also emphasized that models such as Meizu 22, Meizu Note 16 series, and Meizu Lucky 08 are still on sale and will not increase in price later; among them, the 1TB version of Meizu 22 has sold out through official channels, and there is not much stock left for the Homecoming Edition. 他同时强调，魅族 22、魅族 Note 16 系列、魅族 Lucky 08 等机型仍在正常销售，且后续不会涨价；其中魅族 22 的 1TB 版本已在官方渠道售罄，归航版库存也不多。

Wan Zhiqiang stated that the Flyme system will no longer release major version updates in the future, but will still maintain basic maintenance. 万志强表示，Flyme 系统未来将不再推出大版本更新，但仍会维持基础维护。

item.title: vivo X300 Ultra MWC 首秀：双 2 亿三摄与「增距镜之王」齐亮相
item.guid: vivo-X300-Ultra-MWC-首秀：双-2-亿三摄与「增距镜之王」齐亮相
item.description:
Yesterday, vivo product manager Han Boxiao posted real photos of the flagship model vivo X300 Ultra on Weibo. The new phone was exhibited at MWC 2026, alongside the 400mm Zeiss teleconverter, dubbed "King of Teleconverters," a professional photography grip, and a SmallRig video expansion kit. 昨天，vivo 产品经理韩伯啸在微博晒出旗舰机型 vivo X300 Ultra 真机照，新机在 MWC 2026 展出，号称「增距镜之王」的 400mm 蔡司增距镜、专业摄影手柄以及 SmallRig 视频拓展套件等同步亮相。

According to reports, the vivo X300 Ultra's imaging system adopts a dual 200-megapixel triple-camera large-sensor solution, including a 35mm custom 200-megapixel main camera (Sony LYTIA 901, 1/1.12-inch), a 50MP 1/1.28-inch ultra-wide-angle lens, and a 200-megapixel 85mm Zeiss periscope telephoto lens. 据介绍，vivo X300 Ultra 的影像系统采用双 2 亿像素三摄全大底方案，包括 35mm 定制 2 亿像素主摄（索尼 LYTIA 901，1/1.12 英寸）、50MP 1/1.28 英寸超广角，以及 2 亿像素 85mm 蔡司潜望长焦。

The external teleconverter can further enhance telephoto capabilities, and the official statement claims it significantly improves long-distance detail capture performance in scenarios such as concerts and sporting events. 外挂增距镜可进一步强化远摄能力，官方称其在演唱会、体育赛事等场景中可显著提升远距离细节捕捉表现。

The front of the device features a 6.82-inch 2K BOE four-narrow-bezel flat screen, expected to support LTPO; the rear camera module continues the large circular Deco design, and the side camera button has been removed. 机身正面搭载 6.82 英寸 2K 京东方四窄边直屏，预计支持 LTPO；后置相机模组延续大圆 Deco 设计，侧边取消拍照键。

The core configuration is the Qualcomm fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Extreme Edition. At the system level, a new professional video recording mode Pro has been added, supporting full-focal-length 4K 120fps 10bit log and custom 3DLut loading. 核心配置为高通第五代骁龙 8 至尊版。系统层面新增专业录像模式 Pro，支持全焦段 4K 120fps 10bit log，并可加载自定义 3DLut。

Han Boxiao stated that the goal of the X300 Ultra is to become a "camera in your pocket," fully incorporating camera concepts in terms of video, color, control, and image quality to form a complete professional creative system. 韩伯啸表示，X300 Ultra 的目标是成为「口袋里的摄影机」，在视频、色彩、操控与画质等方面全面引入相机理念，形成一套完整的专业创作系统。

🔗 Related Reading: vivo X300 Ultra Debuts at MWC: How to Make Videos Becomes a New Challenge for Phone Manufacturers | MWC 2026 🔗 相关阅读： vivo X300 Ultra 亮相 MWC，怎么做视频，成为手机厂商的新考题｜MWC 2026

item.title: 小鹏发布第二代 VLA：用时比导航预估还短
item.guid: 小鹏发布第二代-VLA：用时比导航预估还短
item.description:
Yesterday, Xpeng Motors officially released its second-generation VLA, which has undergone a complete reconstruction in terms of model architecture, scenario coverage, and inference efficiency, attempting to enhance urban commuting experience with an "intuitive" decision-making approach. 昨天，小鹏汽车正式发布第二代 VLA，在模型架构、场景覆盖和推理效率上进行了全面重构，试图以「直觉式」决策方式提升城市通勤体验。

Xpeng CEO He Xiaopeng stated at the press conference that the second-generation VLA achieves end-to-end direct decision-making by eliminating the traditional "vision → language translation → action" intermediate steps, resulting in an 80% reduction in system response latency and a 12-fold increase in inference efficiency. 小鹏 CEO 何小鹏在发布会上表示，第二代 VLA 通过去除传统「视觉→语言转译→动作」的中间环节，实现端到端直接决策，系统响应延迟下降 80%，推理效率提升 12 倍。

Test videos show that the system can identify unexpected situations such as pedestrians in dark clothing, small animals, and potholes at night through pure vision, and slow down or avoid them in advance; on unlit muddy roads, the vehicle can autonomously identify the road surface and navigate around obstacles, with zero human intervention throughout. 实测视频显示，系统在夜间可通过纯视觉识别黑衣行人、小动物、坑洼等突发情况，并提前减速或避让；在无灯泥路中，车辆可自主识别路面并绕行，全程零接管。

In terms of traffic efficiency, Xpeng's second-generation VLA completed a route in Guangzhou city that was estimated to take 44 minutes by navigation, with an actual time of 43 minutes , approaching the performance of experienced drivers. 在通行效率方面， 小鹏第二代 VLA 在广州城区完成一段导航预估 44 分钟的路线，实际用时 43 分钟 ，接近老司机的通行表现。

Xpeng announced the rollout and implementation plan for the second-generation VLA: 小鹏公布了第二代 VLA 的推送与落地计划：

    Starting March 11 this year, 732 stores nationwide will open for test drives;

    Robotaxi has begun public road testing;

    Gray-scale rollout to P7, G7, and X9 Ultra models will begin in late March;

    In April, it will expand to all Ultra models, including P7+, G9, G6, G7, etc.;

    In 2027, it will be delivered globally as a "full-blooded version," not relying on high-precision maps, and without the need to rewrite rules to adapt to local regulations;

    Volkswagen will be the launch customer for the second-generation VLA.

item.title: 面向下一代智能驾驶芯片，理想汽车发布「软硬协同设计定律」
item.guid: 面向下一代智能驾驶芯片，理想汽车发布「软硬协同设计定律」
item.description:
According to Li Auto's official statement, Li Auto and the National Institute of Decision Intelligence Technology recently jointly announced the "Software-Hardware Collaborative Design Law" for edge-side large models, proposing a software-hardware integrated design method for large models in vehicle and edge computing scenarios, laying a systematic theoretical foundation for the next generation of self-developed intelligent driving chips. 据理想汽车官方，理想汽车与国创决策智能技术研究所近日联合公布端侧大模型「软硬协同设计定律」，提出面向车载与边缘计算场景的大模型软硬一体化设计方法，为下一代自研智能驾驶芯片奠定系统性理论基础。

Li Auto pointed out that software-hardware co-design has become a focal point of industry competition. The key is no longer who uses more or more expensive chips, but rather who can achieve more efficient utilization of computing power with limited resources. 理想汽车指出，软硬协同已成为行业竞争焦点，关键不再是谁使用更多、更贵的芯片，而是谁能在有限资源下实现更高效的算力利用。

The "Software-Hardware Collaborative Design Law" for the first time establishes a quantifiable and predictable mathematical framework for software-hardware co-design. By jointly modeling model accuracy and inference latency, it achieves system-level optimized matching of algorithm architecture and hardware resources, breaking through the previous fragmented modes of "chip first, then algorithm" or "algorithm first, then find hardware." 「软硬协同设计定律」首次建立可量化、可预测的软硬协同数学框架，通过对模型精度与推理延迟的联合建模，实现算法架构与硬件资源的系统级优化匹配，突破过去「先芯片后算法」或「先算法再找硬件」的割裂模式。

Based on this research, Li Auto is advancing the architectural definition of its next-generation self-developed intelligent driving chip. Starting from algorithmic requirements, it will natively support sparse computing, dynamic resource scheduling, and mixed-precision inference, creating an "algorithm-native chip" for vehicle VLA systems to achieve higher energy efficiency and stronger intelligent performance. 基于该研究，理想汽车正在推进下一代自研智能驾驶芯片的架构定义，将以算法需求为起点，原生支持稀疏计算、动态资源调度与混合精度推理，打造面向车载 VLA 系统的「算法原生芯片」，以实现更高能效比与更强智能表现。

📖 Paper address: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.10377 📖 论文地址： https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.10377

item.title: 星链 V2 卫星获批部署，马斯克称将提供 5G 太空互联网
item.guid: 星链-V2-卫星获批部署，马斯克称将提供-5G-太空互联网
item.description:
Yesterday, Elon Musk reposted an official Starlink message on the X platform, stating that the second-generation Starlink Mobile satellites will provide "5G speed" space internet service, with data density 100 times that of the current V1 generation. 昨天，马斯克在 X 平台转发 Starlink 官方消息称，第二代星链移动（Starlink Mobile）卫星将提供「5G 速度」的太空互联网服务，数据密度是当前 V1 代的 100 倍。

In January this year, the U.S. Federal Communications Commission (FCC) approved SpaceX to deploy an additional 7,500 second-generation Starlink satellites, bringing its total approved number to 15,000. 今年 1 月，美国联邦通信委员会（FCC）已批准 SpaceX 额外部署 7500 颗第二代星链卫星，使其累计获批数量达到 15000 颗。

These new-generation satellites possess significant technical advantages, including higher capacity, lower latency, more advanced configurations, and support for multiple frequency bands such as Ku, Ka, V, E, and W. By adding new orbital shells (340 km to 485 km), they further optimize signal coverage and stability, enhancing service performance. 这些新一代卫星在技术上具备显著优势，包括更高信容量、更低延迟、更先进的构型，并支持 Ku、Ka、V、E、W 等多个频段。通过新增轨道壳层（340 公里至 485 公里），进一步优化信号覆盖与稳定性，提升服务性能。

item.title: 美团推出首款 AI 原生浏览器 Tabbit
item.guid: 美团推出首款-AI-原生浏览器-Tabbit
item.description:
According to reports from "Sci-Tech Innovation Board Daily," Meituan's Lightyear Beyond (GN06) team announced that its first AI-native browser, Tabbit, has officially entered the public beta phase. 据《科创板日报》报道，美团旗下光年之外（GN06）团队宣布，其首款 AI 原生浏览器 Tabbit 已正式进入公测阶段。

Tabbit's core feature lies in breaking through the functional boundaries of traditional browsers. Users can complete web page reading, cross-site searching, invoking AI for summarization or creation, and further execute chained tasks within the same interface, reducing efficiency loss caused by application switching. Tabbit 的核心特征在于突破传统浏览器的功能边界，用户可在同一界面中完成网页阅读、跨站搜索、调用 AI 进行总结或创作，并进一步执行任务链式操作，减少应用切换带来的效率损耗。

The Lightyear Beyond team defines it as an "AI-native" product, emphasizing that its underlying design is built around AI capabilities, rather than merely adding plug-in features to a traditional browser. 光年之外团队将其定义为「AI 原生」产品，强调其从底层设计即围绕 AI 能力构建，而非在传统浏览器上叠加插件式功能。

item.title: MiniMax 公布上市后首份财报：营收大增、亏损同步扩大
item.guid: MiniMax-公布上市后首份财报：营收大增、亏损同步扩大
item.description:
According to Yicai Global, AI large model company MiniMax yesterday released its first annual financial report since going public, with a particularly prominent "two-sided" performance of rapid revenue growth alongside expanding losses: 据第一财经报道，AI 大模型企业 MiniMax 昨天公布了上市后的首份年度财报，营收高速增长与亏损同步扩大的「两面性」表现尤为突出：

    Last year's revenue was approximately $79.04 million, a year-on-year increase of 159%; net loss for the year expanded by 302% year-on-year to $1.87 billion, of which nearly $1.6 billion came from changes in the fair value of financial liabilities; adjusted net loss was approximately $250 million, roughly flat with the previous year.

    In 2025, AI-native product revenue increased by 143% year-on-year to $53.1 million; open platform and enterprise service revenue increased by 198% year-on-year to $26 million, mainly due to an increase in the number of paying customers;

    In 2025, approximately 73% of revenue came from international markets, reaching $57.66 million; revenue from mainland China was approximately $21.38 million. The company's products have cumulatively served approximately 236 million users, with over 214,000 enterprise customers and developers;

    In terms of costs, R&D expenses in 2025 reached $250 million, a year-on-year increase of 33.8%, mainly due to increased cloud service expenditures resulting from model iterations.

item.title: 银河通用获 25 亿元融资，国家大基金入局
item.guid: 银河通用获-25-亿元融资，国家大基金入局
item.description:
According to Tencent Tech, Galaxy Universal Robotics announced the completion of a new round of financing totaling 2.5 billion yuan. The National Artificial Intelligence Industry Investment Fund (National Big Fund Phase III) made its first investment in an embodied AI enterprise, marking the official birth of the "National Team for Embodied Large Models." 据腾讯科技报道，银河通用机器人宣布完成 25 亿元新一轮融资，国家人工智能产业基金（国家大基金三期）首次投资具身智能企业，标志着「具身大模型国家队」正式诞生。

This round of financing also attracted participation from central state-owned enterprises and industrial capital such as Sinopec, CITIC Group, Bank of China, SAIC Group, and SMIC Juyuan. Two months ago, Galaxy Universal just completed approximately 2.1 billion yuan in financing, setting a new record for a single round of financing in China's embodied AI sector, and now it has oversubscribed again, demonstrating high attention from the capital market. 本轮融资还吸引了中国石化、中信集团、中国银行、上汽集团、中芯聚源等央企与产业资本参与。两个月前，银河通用刚完成约 21 亿元融资，刷新中国具身智能单轮融资纪录，如今再度超募，显示资本市场的高度关注。

Galaxy General was founded in 2023 by Wang He, a Tsinghua undergraduate and Stanford Ph.D. The company, centered on end-to-end embodied large models, has created "Galaxy Star Brain," the world's first full-body and full-hand model integrating "brain-cerebellum-neural control." 银河通用成立于 2023 年，由清华本科、斯坦福博士王鹤创立。公司以端到端具身大模型为核心，打造了全球首个集成「大脑-小脑-神经控制」的全身全手模型「银河星脑」。

item.title: 💡 Bill Gurley：不热爱工作的人最容易被 AI 取代
item.guid: 💡-Bill-Gurley：不热爱工作的人最容易被-AI-取代
item.description:
According to Business Insider, renowned venture capitalist Bill Gurley recently stated on the podcast "On with Kara Swisher" that amidst the rapidly evolving AI wave this year, professionals who lack passion for their work, clear goals, and have long performed their duties in a "mechanical" manner will be the easiest to replace by AI. 据《商业内幕》报道，知名风险投资人 Bill Gurley 近日在播客节目「On with Kara Swisher」中表示，在今年快速演进的 AI 浪潮下，那些对工作缺乏热情、缺乏明确目标、长期「机械式」履行职责的从业者，将最容易被 AI 取代。

Gurley pointed out that many young people follow the path of "university — stable job," ultimately entering industries they don't love and becoming "cogs on an assembly line." Gurley 指出，许多年轻人沿着「大学 — 稳定工作」的路径前进，最终进入自己并不热爱的行业，成为「流水线上的齿轮」。

In his view, these types of positions are most susceptible to being reshaped by AI because practitioners lack intrinsic motivation and the drive for continuous skill improvement. He believes that the development of AI has already prompted several large tech companies to slow down hiring or conduct early layoffs to cope with a more efficient digital workforce in the future. 在他看来，这类岗位最容易被 AI 重塑，因为从业者缺乏内在驱动力，也缺乏持续提升技能的动力。他认为，AI 的发展已经促使多家大型科技公司放缓招聘或提前裁员，以应对未来更高效的数字劳动力。

He quoted Buffett's saying, "I tap-dance to work every day," pointing out that when a person genuinely loves their job, "self-improvement is free," because learning and growth happen naturally. 他引用巴菲特「每天都在跳着踢踏舞去上班」的说法，指出当一个人真正喜欢自己的工作时，「精进是免费的」，因为学习与提升会自然发生。

He further stated that AI's significance for professionals is akin to "jet fuel," capable of significantly amplifying individual capabilities. 他进一步表示，AI 对职场人的意义类似「喷气燃料」，能显著放大个人能力。

If employees can become "the person who understands AI best" in the team, they can not only learn faster but also gain higher irreplaceability within the organization. 员工若能成为团队中「最懂 AI 的那个人」，不仅能更快学习，也能在组织中获得更高的不可替代性。

If you can utilize AI well, you will become the person they least want to lay off.

item.title: 30.98 万元起，小鹏发布 2026 款 X9 纯电版
item.guid: 30.98-万元起，小鹏发布-2026-款-X9-纯电版
item.description:
Yesterday, Xpeng released the 2026 Xpeng X9 pure electric version. The new car features a full-domain 800V high-voltage silicon carbide architecture and 5C supercharging technology across all models, with a CLTC range of up to 750km, further enhancing the long-distance and recharging capabilities of the large seven-seater pure electric MPV. 昨天，小鹏发布 2026 款小鹏 X9 纯电版，新车全系搭载全域 800V 高压碳化硅架构与 5C 超充技术，CLTC 续航最高可达 750km，进一步强化大七座纯电 MPV 的长途与补能能力。

In terms of intelligence, all models come standard with a self-developed Turing AI chip and are among the first to be equipped with the second-generation VLA large model, enhancing the system's perception, decision-making, and complex scenario processing capabilities. 智能化方面，全系标配自研图灵 AI 芯片，并首批搭载第二代 VLA 大模型，提升系统的感知、决策与复杂场景处理能力。

Cabin configurations have also been upgraded, including three-row electric triple-folding seats (standard across all models), RNC active road noise reduction, and zero-gravity seats (including exclusive airbags). 座舱配置也同步升级，包括三排座椅电动三折叠（全系标配）、RNC 主动路噪消减、零重力座椅（含专属安全气囊）等。

In terms of handling and safety, the new car comes standard with an active rear-wheel steering system and a tire blowout stable driving system, enhancing the flexibility of medium-to-large vehicles and safety redundancy in extreme scenarios. 在操控与安全层面，新车标配主动式后轮转向系统与爆胎稳行系统，提升中大型车的灵活性与极端场景下的安全冗余。

Regarding pricing, the 2026 Xpeng X9 pure electric version offers 5 models, with official guide prices ranging from 309,800 yuan to 369,800 yuan: 售价方面，2026 款小鹏 X9 纯电版共推出 5 款车型，官方指导价 30.98 万元至 36.98 万元：

    665 Max

    650 Ultra SE

    650 Ultra

    750 Ultra

    710 Four-wheel Drive Ultra

Additionally, the 2026 X9 Super Extended Range version adds a 1602 Ultra SE variant, priced at 321,800 yuan. 同时，2026 款 X9 超级增程版新增 1602 Ultra SE 版本，售价 32.18 万元。

🔗 Related reading: Starting from 309,800 yuan, the new Xpeng X9 pure electric version is released: Intelligent driving completes the entire journey, 1 minute faster than navigation estimates 🔗 相关阅读： 30.98 万元起，新小鹏 X9 纯电版发布：智驾跑完全程，比导航预计还快 1 分钟

item.title: 联想多款 AI 硬件亮相 MWC
item.guid: 联想多款-AI-硬件亮相-MWC
item.description:
Yesterday, at MWC 2026 held in Barcelona, Spain, Lenovo showcased a range of new AI hardware products covering desktop, mobile, creative, and enterprise scenarios, emphasizing the practical application of AI from "usable" to "easy to use." 昨天，在西班牙巴塞罗那举行的 MWC 2026 上，联想集中展示了覆盖桌面、移动、创作与企业级场景的多款 AI 硬件新品，重点强调 AI 从「能用」走向「好用」的落地方向。

    AI Workmate Concept Machine: Positioned as a desktop AI work partner, it can provide real-time assistance in scenarios such as meetings, reading, and organizing materials, and can project task lists, meeting highlights, and other content onto a desktop or wall, forming a "lightweight dashboard" to reduce screen switching and confirmation costs;

    AI Work Companion Concept Machine: Presented in the form of a desktop clock, it can automatically generate daily plans, monitor focus, and generate a "celebration report" on weekends, emphasizing a healthy rhythm and lightweight interaction;

    ThinkBook Modular AI PC Concept Machine: Forms a "toolbox-style" form factor through a detachable keyboard, secondary screen, and interchangeable I/O modules, supporting multiple screen combinations, expandable up to approximately 19 inches of visible area, adapting to multi-scenario needs from mobile office to team collaboration;

    Yoga Book Pro 3D Concept Machine: Equipped with a naked-eye 3D screen and dual OLEDs, it supports 2D to 3D conversion, prompt-based scene generation, zero-touch gesture operation, and is powered by Intel Core Ultra 7 and NVIDIA RTX 5070 GPU, targeting a new generation of 3D creators;

    Legion Go Fold Concept Handheld: Features a POLED screen expandable from 7.7 inches to 11.6 inches, supporting four modes: standard handheld, vertical split screen, Horizon full screen, and extended desktop, targeting mobile gaming and light office scenarios.

Lenovo also showcased several new phone products at this MWC: 联想还在本次 MWC 上展示了几款手机新品：

    moto razr fold foldable AI phone: The first book-style foldable model in the razr series, featuring an 8.1-inch 2K LTPO inner screen + 6.6-inch outer screen combination, with a peak brightness of up to 6200 nits, and equipped with a 6000mAh battery and Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 platform, enhancing dual-screen interaction and creative experience;

    edge 70 fusion / fusion+: Features a four-curved design, Pantone-certified colors, and brings several "global first" configurations in imaging and durability, including a Sony LYTIA 710 sensor, 144Hz screen, and IP68/IP69 protection;

    FIFA World Cup 26™ Partnership: moto has become the official smartphone partner for FIFA Heroes, with multiple devices supporting a "plug-and-play" experience, and optimizing the large-screen gaming view for the razr fold.

item.title: 到手价 1997 元，千问 AI 眼镜开启全渠道预约
item.guid: 到手价-1997-元，千问-AI-眼镜开启全渠道预约
item.description:
Yesterday, Qianwen's first AI hardware, the "Qianwen AI Glasses," officially launched and opened for "0-yuan pre-orders" across all channels. The product will be available for sale on March 8th and will enter the global market within this year. 昨天，千问首款 AI 硬件「千问 AI 眼镜」正式上线，并在全渠道开启「0 元预约」。产品将于 3 月 8 日现货发售、今年内登陆全球市场。

Among them, the high-end G1 series, with national subsidies, has a final price of 1997 yuan, significantly lowering the entry barrier for high-end AI glasses. 其中，定位高端的 G1 系列，叠加国补后到手价为 1997 元，显著降低了高端 AI 眼镜的入门门槛。

In terms of software ecosystem, Qianwen AI Glasses will be fully integrated with the Qianwen APP, and the first batch of "task-oriented" functions (including ordering takeout, booking hotels, etc.) are expected to be open to users by the end of March. 在软件生态方面，千问 AI 眼镜将全面接入千问 APP，首批「办事」类功能（包括点外卖、订酒店等）预计将在 3 月底向用户开放。

item.title: 范式推出低成本的 Agent 基础设施 PhanClaw，可接入 OpenClaw
item.guid: 范式推出低成本的-Agent-基础设施-PhanClaw，可接入-OpenClaw
item.description:
Yesterday, Fansi Intelligence announced that OpenClaw has officially integrated with PhanthyCloud and simultaneously launched the deeply integrated version, PhanClaw, positioned as a secure, controllable, and low-cost Agent infrastructure for developers and enterprise teams. 昨天，范式智能宣布，OpenClaw 已正式接入 PhanthyCloud，并同步推出深度集成版本 PhanClaw，定位为面向开发者与企业团队的安全可控、低成本 Agent 基础设施。

Fansi pointed out that the high costs and risks associated with traditional deployment models have become key factors hindering the large-scale implementation of OpenClaw, including daily operating costs of up to thousands of dollars and security risks posed by the exposure of local sensitive information. 范式指出，传统部署模式下的高成本与高风险成为阻碍 OpenClaw 规模化落地的关键因素，包括每日高达千美元级别的运行成本，以及本地敏感信息暴露带来的安全隐患。

Relying on PhanthyCloud's resource pooling architecture, PhanClaw significantly reduces computing power and operation and maintenance costs, and provides long-term memory capabilities for Agents through a persistent data mechanism, avoiding the need for retraining at each startup. 依托 PhanthyCloud 的资源池化架构，PhanClaw 显著降低了算力与运维成本，并通过持久化数据机制为 Agent 提供长期记忆能力，避免每次启动都需重新调教。

At the same time, PhanClaw supports running large model services in a private cloud environment, ensuring that data does not leave the local system, thereby fundamentally reducing the risk of privacy leakage. 同时，PhanClaw 支持在私有云环境中运行大模型服务，确保数据不离开本地，从根源上降低隐私泄露风险。

In terms of model capabilities, PhanClaw provides multiple high-performance models through ModelHub, including GLM-5, MiniMax M 2.5, and Kimi K2.5, and can be integrated with Phanthy Pantheon's world model system with one click to support more complex task scheduling. 在模型能力方面，PhanClaw 通过 ModelHub 提供包括 GLM-5、MiniMax M 2.5、Kimi K2.5 在内的多款高性能模型，并可一键接入 Phanthy 万神殿的世界模型体系，以支持更复杂的任务调度。

item.title: 阿里开源 4 款 Qwen3.5 小模型
item.guid: 阿里开源-4-款-Qwen3.5-小模型
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba announced the open-sourcing of 4 small-sized Qwen3.5 models, including Qwen3.5-0.8B, 2B, 4B, and 9B. 昨天，阿里宣布开源 4 款 Qwen3.5 小尺寸模型，包括 Qwen3.5‑0.8B、2B、4B 与 9B。

The new models continue the Qwen3.5 family's multimodal training approach and latest architectural design, covering various resource conditions from edge to server side, with official emphasis on their leading performance among models of the same size. 新模型延续 Qwen3.5 家族的多模态训练方式与最新架构设计，覆盖从端侧到服务器侧的多种资源条件，官方强调其在同尺寸模型中均达到领先性能。

    Qwen3.5‑0.8B / 2B : Focuses on extreme lightness, small size, and fast inference speed, suitable for mobile devices, IoT edge devices, and low-latency real-time interaction scenarios;

    Qwen3.5‑4B : Positioned as a foundational model for lightweight agents, possessing multimodal capabilities, striking a balance between performance and resource consumption;

    Qwen3.5‑9B : Compact in structure but with leapfrog performance, officially stated to rival gpt‑oss‑120B, suitable for server deployment with limited video memory but requiring a high level of intelligence.

The official statement indicates that the Qwen 3.5 series now covers a complete size range from 0.8B to 397B, totaling 8 models. The official claim is that all of them have achieved new performance highs at their respective scales and have secured the top four spots on the Hugging Face global open-source model leaderboard. 官方表示，至此，千问 3.5 系列已覆盖从 0.8B 到 397B 的完整尺寸区间，共计 8 款模型，官方称其均在同等规模下达到性能新高，并在 Hugging Face 全球开源模型榜单中包揽前四名。

item.title: 字节预热下一代空间操作系统 PICO OS 6
item.guid: 字节预热下一代空间操作系统-PICO-OS-6
item.description:
Yesterday, ByteDance's PICO officially previewed its next-generation spatial operating system, PICO OS 6, and announced the launch of a new XR flagship product, "Project Swan," this year. 昨天，字节跳动旗下 PICO 正式预告了下一代空间操作系统 PICO OS 6，并宣布将在今年推出全新 XR 旗舰产品「Project Swan」。

It is reported that PICO OS 6 achieves seamless integration of 2D applications, 3D experiences, virtual environments, and physical reality, supporting spatial multitasking. Interaction methods include eye and hand tracking, gestures, controllers, keyboards, and mice, among other modes. 据悉，PICO OS 6 实现了 2D 应用、3D 体验、虚拟环境与物理现实的无缝融合，支持空间多任务处理。交互方式涵盖眼手追踪、手势、手柄、键鼠等多种模式。

At the ecosystem level, the system is fully compatible with spatial applications, OpenXR, WebXR, Android applications, web applications, and PC VR streaming. It also introduces the PICO Spatial SDK, allowing developers to build based on Kotlin and declarative UI frameworks, and complete testing without a headset using a desktop simulator. 生态层面，系统全面兼容空间应用、OpenXR、WebXR、安卓应用、Web 应用及 PC VR 串流，并推出 PICO Spatial SDK，开发者可基于 Kotlin 与声明式 UI 框架进行开发，借助桌面模拟器无需头显即可完成测试。

In terms of hardware, Project Swan features a new generation MicroOLED display with a pixel density close to 4000PPI, an average optical solution of 40PPD, and over 45PPD in the central area. 硬件方面，Project Swan 搭载新一代 MicroOLED 显示屏，像素密度接近 4000PPI，光学方案平均 40PPD，中心区域超过 45PPD。

The new product adopts a dual-chip architecture, with a self-developed chip working in conjunction with a flagship SoC, boosting CPU and GPU performance by more than double compared to the previous generation, further breaking through XR performance bottlenecks. 新品采用双芯片架构，自研芯片与旗舰 SoC 协同工作，使 CPU 与 GPU 性能较上一代提升一倍以上，进一步突破 XR 性能瓶颈。

Currently, PICO has launched the "Global Pioneer Experience Program" on its official website, recruiting global XR users to participate in the closed beta testing of PICO OS 6 and Project Swan to gather genuine feedback. 目前，PICO 已在官网开启「全球先锋体验计划」，面向全球 XR 用户招募参与 PICO OS 6 与 Project Swan 的封闭测试，以收集真实反馈。

item.title: 星巴克玫瑰 20 系列回归，160+ 主题门店上线
item.guid: 星巴克玫瑰-20-系列回归，160+-主题门店上线
item.description:
Yesterday, Starbucks announced the official return of the Rose 20 series to its stores nationwide. A cup filled with 20 roses of natural fresh flower extract, blended with Starbucks' iconic Golden Roast espresso, unleashes a bright floral aroma and an enchanting spring ambiance. 昨天，星巴克宣布玫瑰 20 系列正式回归全国门店，一杯满载20朵玫瑰的天然鲜花 · 萃，融合标志性的星巴克金烘浓缩咖啡，迸发出明亮的花香和令人心动的春日气息。

The essence of Rose 20 comes from Pingyin, Shandong, known as the "Rose Capital of China." Local flower farmers insist on hand-picking semi-open rosebuds between 2-6 AM and extracting the first dew through a low-temperature slow-extraction method within 15 hours to preserve the natural floral fragrance. 玫瑰 20 的核心来自被称为「中国玫瑰之都」的山东平阴。当地花农坚持在凌晨 2-6 点手工采摘半开花冠，并在 15 小时内以低温慢萃方式提取头道花露，以保留天然花香。

At the in-store experience level, Starbucks continues to reinforce the "from field to cup" thematic narrative. The rose-themed flagship store on the 3rd floor of Shenzhen UpperHills creates an immersive space with installations like a rose wall and a rose "portal," while national event stores will also present the rose theme in a scenic manner. 在门店体验层面，星巴克继续强化「从花田到舌尖」的主题叙事。深圳深业上城 3F 的玫瑰主题旗舰店以玫瑰花墙、玫瑰「传送门」等装置打造沉浸式空间，全国活动店也将以场景化方式呈现玫瑰主题。

item.title: 杭州一影院试行「电影难看，20 分钟内退 40%」服务
item.guid: 杭州一影院试行「电影难看，20-分钟内退-40%」服务
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Hangzhou Xitian City Times United Cinema recently attracted attention for launching a "movie experience guarantee service," with the topic "If the movie is bad, you can get a 40% refund within 20 minutes" trending on hot searches. 据界面新闻报道，杭州西田城时代联合影城近日因推出「观影体验保障服务」引发关注，「电影难看，20 分钟内可退款 40%」的话题登上热搜。

A staff member from the cinema stated that the service has been on trial since March 1st and will continue until April 30th. If viewers feel the experience is unsatisfactory within 20 minutes of the film's start, they can receive a 40% refund of the actual payment amount with a valid movie ticket. 该影城工作人员表示，该服务自 3 月 1 日起试行，将持续至 4 月 30 日。观众在影片开场 20 分钟内如认为体验不佳，可凭有效电影票退还实际支付金额的 40%。

Since cinemas need to settle approximately 60% of box office revenue with the film distributors and cinema chains, a full refund cannot be provided. The cinema emphasized that refund applications must be processed on-site and cannot be processed after leaving the premises. 由于影院需将约 60% 票房收入结算给片方及院线，因此无法提供全额退款。影城强调，退费申请须在现场办理，离场后将无法继续操作。

The report points out that similar services have precedents. In February 2024, Henan Xuchang Pang Dong Lai Cinema launched a "50% ticket refund within 20 minutes" service, with the same reason that the remaining portion needed to be submitted to the cinema chain. 报道指出，类似服务此前已有先例。2024 年 2 月，河南许昌胖东来影城曾推出「20 分钟内退票 50%」的服务，理由同样是剩余部分需上交院线。

Although relevant policies and industry standards have existed since 2018, in practice, post-screening ticket refunds remain rare, mainly due to higher costs and procedural complexity. 尽管相关政策早在 2018 年已有行业规范，但在实际操作中，放映后退票仍属少数案例，主要因成本与流程复杂度较高。

item.title: 豆瓣「满 200 减 200」薅羊毛上热搜，官方回应
item.guid: 豆瓣「满-200-减-200」薅羊毛上热搜，官方回应
item.description:
In the early hours of yesterday, Douban Doupin Mall experienced a serious operational error during its International Women's Day promotional event. 昨日凌晨，豆瓣豆品商城在妇女节促销活动中出现严重运营失误。

The "Spend 200, Get 20 Off" promotion, originally planned, was incorrectly configured as "Spend 200, Get 200 Off" due to a backend setup error. This led to users being able to acquire items originally priced over 200 yuan for only about 10 yuan in shipping fees, triggering a massive buying spree. The topic "Douban薅羊毛" (Douban Wool-gathering/Bargain Hunting) quickly trended on Weibo. 原本计划推出的「满 200 减 20」优惠因后台设置错误，被错误配置为「满 200 减 200」，导致用户仅需支付约 10 元运费即可获得原价 200 元以上的商品，引发大规模抢购。「豆瓣薅羊毛」话题随即登上微博热搜。

Douban Doupin's official team later issued an apology statement at noon, stating that the number of abnormal orders far exceeded operating costs, and the company could not bear the huge losses. The official decided to fully refund all abnormal orders generated between 00:00 and 10:00 on that day, and to issue a 20 yuan no-threshold red envelope to relevant user accounts as compensation. 豆瓣豆品官方随后在午间发布致歉声明，称异常订单数量远超运营成本，公司无法承受巨额损失。官方决定对当天 00:00—10:00 期间产生的所有异常订单进行全额退款，并向相关用户账户发放 20 元无门槛红包作为补偿。

item.title: Netflix CEO 谈退出收购华纳：价格太高
item.guid: Netflix-CEO-谈退出收购华纳：价格太高
item.description:
According to Bloomberg and Business Insider, Netflix co-CEO Ted Sarandos stated in an interview that the decision to withdraw from the acquisition of Warner Bros. was not an impromptu one, but was based on the company's pre-formulated bidding plan. 据彭博社、《商业内幕》报道，Netflix 联席 CEO 特德·萨兰多斯（Ted Sarandos）在接受采访时表示，退出收购华纳兄弟的决定并非临时起意，而是基于公司事先制定的竞标方案。

He stated that when Paramount offered a higher bid and provided transaction details, Netflix had made it clear that it would not continue to raise its price. 他表示，当派拉蒙提出更高报价并提供交易细节时，Netflix 已明确不会继续加价。

Last December, Netflix had agreed to acquire Warner Bros.' studio business and HBO Max streaming business, and actively promoted the deal in venues such as the White House. 去年 12 月，Netflix 曾同意收购华纳兄弟的制片厂业务及 HBO Max 流媒体业务，并在白宫等场合积极推动交易。

However, the acquisition plan was opposed by Hollywood unions, some politicians, and industry figures such as renowned director James Cameron, partly because Netflix has historically provided insufficient support for cinemas. In response, Sarandos said that discussions with film distributors over the past few months might lead to more Netflix films appearing in theaters. 然而，该收购计划遭到好莱坞工会、部分政界人士及知名导演詹姆斯·卡梅隆等业界人士反对，原因包括 Netflix 历来对院线支持不足。对此，萨兰多斯回应称，过去几个月与电影发行商的洽谈可能促使更多 Netflix 影片登陆影院。

Currently, Paramount has won the bid with an offer of approximately $111 billion and will need to pay a $2.8 billion breakup fee. Industry insiders believe this deal will reshape the Hollywood landscape but also comes with high debt and the risk of large-scale layoffs. 目前，派拉蒙已以约 1110 亿美元的报价赢得竞购，并需支付 28 亿美元解约费。业内人士认为，这笔交易将重塑好莱坞格局，但也伴随高额债务与大规模裁员风险。

item.title: 《超级马力欧银河大电影》定档 4 月 3 日
item.guid: 《超级马力欧银河大电影》定档-4-月-3-日
item.description:
The Super Mario Galaxy Movie has been confirmed to be released in mainland Chinese cinemas on April 3rd. 《超级马力欧银河大电影》已确认将于 4 月 3 日登陆中国内地院线。

The film features voice acting by Chris Pratt, Anya Taylor-Joy, Jack Black, and others, continues the previous work's worldview, and adds more characters such as Princess Rosalina, Yoshi, and Bowser Jr. 影片由克里斯·帕拉特、安雅·泰勒-乔伊、杰克·布莱克等主演配音，延续前作世界观，并加入罗莎塔公主、耀西、酷霸 Jr. 等更多角色。

item.title: 《你好，爱美丽》定档 3 月 20 日
item.guid: 《你好，爱美丽》定档-3-月-20-日
item.description:
The animated film 'Hello, Amelie' has officially announced its release on March 20th this year, simultaneously unveiling its 'Spring Date' poster and 'Meeting Spring' trailer. 动画电影《你好，爱美丽》已正式宣布将于今年 3 月 20 日，并同步发布「春日之约」海报与「遇见春天」预告。

The film draws inspiration from author Amélie Nothomb's real childhood experiences, using a bright and healing visual style and a gentle narrative of growth, attempting to bring audiences a spiritual journey full of spring. 影片取材自原作者阿梅莉·诺冬的童年真实经历，以明亮治愈的视觉风格和温柔的成长叙事，试图为观众带来一段充满春天气息的心灵旅程。
